---
title: "phase_space"
---

Phase space volume routines for the analysis of Nested Sampling data

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
**Source:** [`nested_sampling/phase_space.py`](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/nested_sampling/phase_space.py)
:::


## API Reference

#### `get_log_t` {#get_log_t}

```python
def get_log_t(n_live: int, n_iter: int, sampling_t: bool) -> np.ndarray
```

Get the log of the compression factor for Nested Sampling data.

Parameters:
n_live (int): Number of live points (walkers).
n_iter (int): Number of iterations.
sampling_t (bool): If True, sample t from a Beta distribution; otherwise, use the naive approach.

Returns:
np.ndarray: Array of log compression factors.

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/nested_sampling/phase_space.py#L7){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `get_log_X` {#get_log_x}

```python
def get_log_X(log_t: np.ndarray) -> np.ndarray
```

logarithms of the phase space volumes

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/nested_sampling/phase_space.py#L30){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `get_log_w` {#get_log_w}

```python
def get_log_w(log_t: np.ndarray, log_X: np.ndarray, strategy: Literal['fwd', 'symm']) -> np.ndarray
```

weights w_i (see eq. 14 of https://arxiv.org/pdf/2205.15570)

strategy:
    - fwd: forward difference: w_i = X_{i+1} - X_{i}
    - symm: symmetric difference: w_i = (1/2)*(X_{i-1} - X_{i+1})

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/nested_sampling/phase_space.py#L35){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---
